title: Frontend Engineer (React) — UI Craft
description: We’re building a design-forward recruitment platform. You will create polished, responsive UI components, improve usability, and ship production-quality experiences. You should be strong in React and TypeScript, comfortable with CSS, and able to collaborate on component patterns and code quality.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer — Performance & Data
description: We need a senior frontend engineer for a candidate marketplace with heavy filtering and data fetching. You will own performance improvements (Core Web Vitals), caching strategies, and architecture for complex UI state. Experience with testing and reliable data patterns is required.

title: Frontend Engineer — Design Systems
description: You will help scale a design system used across multiple teams. The role involves building reusable components, establishing tokens, and improving accessibility. You should be comfortable documenting components and maintaining consistency across multiple product surfaces.

title: Frontend Engineer — Data Visualization
description: We’re building recruiter analytics: funnels, breakdowns, and interactive charts. You will implement data visualizations and filterable dashboards with clear UX. Strong React fundamentals are required, plus a track record of building interactive charts.

title: Frontend Engineer — Forms & Validation UX
description: You will build recruiter workflows that include complex forms, validation, and great error UX. The ideal candidate is strong in React forms, structured validation patterns, and accessibility for form interactions.
